title: Validation Stamp
description: Written by stamp_validation.py when all steps in a gate pass. Consumed by pre_commit_cli_gate.py on every git commit. One file per gate: .validation_stamp, .frontend_validation_stamp, .agent_validation_stamp, .db_validation_stamp, .api_validation_stamp. Fifteen-minute TTL, branch-specific.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the stamp was written. Combined with ttl_seconds to determine freshness.

branch.description: Git branch the stamp was written on. Branch switch invalidates the stamp.

steps.description: Ordered list of validation step names that passed. Must match the canonical step tuple in _hook_shared.py for this gate.

ttl_seconds.description: Fixed 15-minute TTL. Hard-coded per Modelling precedent to prevent arbitrary extension.

version.description: Schema version of this stamp format (semver). Allows future migration.

gate.description: Which gate this stamp represents. Determines which stamp filename it lives in.

plugin_commit.description: Git SHA of the installed plugin that produced this stamp. Enables drift detection between installed plugin and worktree.
